creator: tatsuki_makino@hotmail.com
text:
Konnichiha

After all, which should we choose? :)

https://lists.freebsd.org/pipermail/freebsd-arch/2017-March/018115.html

Then I saw somewhere that somewhere between the 2.13 and 2.69 versions of autoconf it was changed to ${prefix}/share/man (${datarootdir}/man), but I forget :)
Right now, share/man seems to be the more popular one, but when Mk/bsd.port.mk uses gnu configure, it goes out of its way to change it to man...
